subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy new letter hath arrived. Praise be to God, it betokened great success, and the earlier letter was answered before [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه جدید رسید الحمد لله دلیل بر فوزی شدید بود و نامه پیش را جواب پیش
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
